name: LAMB CHOPS WITH LEMON ANCHOVY BUTTER
servings: serves 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
intro: The flavour and aroma of smoky lamb chops covered in lemon and anchovy butter is to die for. I make this recipe all the time during barbecue season and I think you might do the same once you’ve tried these chops. The salty flavour of the anchovies and tart lemon goes so well with the lamb.

ingredients.item: anchovy fillets, crushed to a paste
green chillies, deseeded and finely chopped
Large handful of coriander (cilantro) stalks, finely chopped
Small handful of mint leaves, finely chopped
A few drops of rose water
A few drops of Himalayan screwpine water (optional; available online and in Asian food shops)

method: Place the butter in a bowl and leave in a warm place for about 10 minutes. Then whisk it until smooth. Add the anchovies and lemon juice and fold it all together. Keep chilled.
Rub the garlic and ginger paste and salt into the lamb chops and leave for 10 minutes.
Mix all the remaining ingredients together in a non-metallic bowl. Add the lamb chops to the bowl and rub the marinade into the meat well. Leave for 30 minutes–48 hours.
Let rest on a warmed plate for a few minutes, then place the chargrilled lamb chops on warm plates, top with the lemon anchovy butter and serve.
